summary: Recording suffers from significant pitch problems, making it noticeably flat.
review: The tape is out of tune, with the entire performance recorded a full semitone low (and even the soundboard sources are still over a third‑semitone flat). This pitch error dominates the listening experience and overshadows any assessment of the musical performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review focusing on a major pitch issue; no positive comments about the show, leading to a low overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Pitch/speed are significantly off – flat by an entire semitone (SBDs still ~1/3 semitone flat).
